overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a neon-lit city sidewalk at dusk. The scene features futuristic holographic billboards, passing vehicles, and pedestrians in a dense cyberpunk urban environment dominated by yellow and green neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk between neon building and multi-lane highway

events.description: dark sedan drives past on the right side of the road
pedestrian in dark clothing passes by closely on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, approaching holographic billboards and neon signs

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall building with horizontal yellow neon light strips and metallic panels
concrete wall with green neon zigzag patterns and red corporate logos
large overhead holographic billboard displaying '2nd Amendment is not only for the rich'
elevated highway structure visible in the distance against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk flanked by a neon-lit building on the left and a busy highway on the right. Yellow neon strips illuminate the building facade while green neon patterns line the sound barrier. A controversial political billboard hangs overhead as vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban sidewalk with multiple corporate advertising billboards

events.description: billboard transitions to display large 'CIRRUS' advertisement in red text
billboard changes to show Kiroshi optical advertisement with large stylized eyes

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk, navigating past pedestrians walking in both directions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking ahead in the same direction
pedestrian in red jacket walking past in the opposite direction

entered.detail: holographic billboard displaying 'CIRRUS' corporate branding in red neon
billboard showing Arasaka corporation imagery and branding
large advertisement showing stylized human eyes for Kiroshi optical implants

segments.scene_description: The character progresses along the sidewalk as the billboards transition from political messaging to corporate advertisements for Cirrus, Arasaka, and Kiroshi. The crowd density increases with pedestrians moving in both directions, while the elevated highway overpass gradually draws closer in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk approaching elevated highway overpass with accumulated litter

events.description: scattered cardboard trash and debris appear on the sidewalk surface
approaching the shadow and cover of the large concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the overpass structure, stepping over scattered debris on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black van with headlights on driving past on the road

entered.detail: scattered cardboard boxes and litter accumulated on the concrete sidewalk
massive concrete pillars and elevated roadway of the highway overpass

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive concrete overpass as the sidewalk becomes littered with trash and debris. The surrounding billboards give way to the imposing structure of the elevated highway, and the lighting becomes slightly dimmer and more shadowed under the approaching overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a neon-lit city sidewalk that transitions from a bright commercial corridor into the shadowed depths of a massive concrete overpass. It begins with the character walking between a building illuminated by yellow neon strips and a highway lined with green patterns, passing beneath a political billboard. As the character progresses, the political messaging shifts into corporate advertisements for Cirrus, Arasaka, and Kiroshi while the crowd of pedestrians grows denser. The scene then moves toward the looming structure of an elevated highway, where the sidewalk becomes littered with trash and debris. Finally, the environment opens up to the imposing concrete overpass as the vibrant neon lighting fades into dimmer, heavy shadows.
